name: voxbulk-local-stack
description: One command to run API + public app + admin for local VOXBULK development

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,public,admin -c blue,green,magenta "node scripts/dev-api.mjs" "wait-on -t 120000 http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/health && npm run dev --prefix voxbulk.com/frontend" "wait-on -t 120000 http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/health && npm run dev --prefix admin.voxbulk.com/adim-web"
